name: plan-refiner
description: Refine plans and specs through in-depth interviews using strategic questioning.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into stronger plans.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through structured interviews to sharpen requirements, expose tradeoffs, and improve implementation plans before execution.
defaultPrompt: Interview me to refine this product spec.
Pressure-test this implementation plan for gaps.
Turn this vague requirement into a concrete phase plan.
